description: A Cubist still life painting featuring dark bottles, a decorative bowl or vessel with a scalloped white edge, grapes, and what appears to be a lobster or crustacean in orange-yellow tones at the bottom. The background is divided into geometric areas of yellow, blue-grey, and muted tones. The composition is vertical and characteristic of Georges Braque's mature Cubist still life works. There is no biblical or religious content visible in this image.
